Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui

Class ProofTreeUIActionGroup.ProofCommandAction

java.lang.Object
org.eclipse.core.commands.common.EventManager
org.eclipse.jface.action.AbstractAction
org.eclipse.jface.action.Action
org.eventb.internal.ui.prooftreeui.ProofTreeUIActionGroup.ProofCommandAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
org.eclipse.jface.action.IAction
Enclosing class:
ProofTreeUIActionGroup
private static final class ProofTreeUIActionGroup.ProofCommandAction extends org.eclipse.jface.action.Action
Action wrapper around IProofCommand. The action is enabled/disabled based on the proof command's isApplicable() and it runs the proof command's apply(). It is possible to force the apply() to run in the UI thread if needed. This only works with implementations of IProofCommand that accept null parameters for their hypothesis predicate and inputs.
